title: Howdah 30 CM Grab Rails for Bathroom and Shower Chrome, Shower Handles for Elderly Stainless Steel Bathroom Grab Rail Safety Handle for Kitchen Bedroom Bathtub, Shower, Steps, Indoor
features: 【Stainless Steel Grab Rails for Bathroom】: The material of the shower rail is made of stainless steel, so there is no doubt about its strength and safety. Shower handles can support up to 152 kg. The stainless steel handrail is durable. Please feel free to use our premium bath grab bars to make any bathroom safer for your family.

【Multipurpose Stable Design】: The shower handles can not only be used as bathtubs and showers to protect your safety, but also your towels, clothes, etc. Grab handles for bathroom handles can provide good support for families in bathtubs, showers, bathrooms and other interiors to minimise the risk of slipping and falling.

【Easy to Install】: Each handle contains 6 stainless steel screws and a 3-hole flange design for bolt installation. The shower rods have a total length of 33.5 cm and a diameter of 2.5 cm. Fixed installation in the desired position to ensure your safety.

【Work for Everyone】: This safety shower rail is suitable for everyone. Shower handles for elderly, shower handle bars for seniors, children, normal person, but also as disabled handles. It offers a guarantee for the safety of you and your family.

【2-year Warranty】: 100% satisfaction guarantee and 2-year warranty. If you have any questions about the sink rack mat, you can contact us at any time, and it will be a professional customer service team to solve the problem for you within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Bathroom Design for Everyone! For more than 10 years, the Howdah brand has been synonymous with inspiration in designing the perfect bathroom. To this end, Howdah designs, develops and manufactures products that meet the highest standards of functionality and design – and at a fair price! You can find an overview of the extensive range of bathroom and household items in our brand shop. Be inspired! Howdah Comfort & Safety Handle 30 cm Material: Chrome-plated Stainless Steel The grab rails in the Howdah Comfort & Safety series offer a secure hold and comfort in the bathroom. The rail is made of stainless steel with a chrome-plated finish and has a tested load capacity of 152 kg. Its shape makes the grab rail particularly suitable for use in the shower, bathtub and toilet. Material: Chrome-plated Stainless Steel Tested Load Capacity: 152 kg Abmessungen: 51 x 300 x 69 mm Assembly Materials Included in Delivery Also Available in Another, Polished Version Chrome-plated Design The use of chrome-plated stainless steel enhances the cleanliness and brightness of the bathroom while ensuring safe use. Concealed Screw Design The wall-mounted grab rails with concealed screws allow you to cover unsightly screw holes, keeping your baths and showers clean and attractive. Thickened Hose The thickness of the tube is 25 mm, and the thickness is just right for the grip of the hand; it can be used horizontally or vertically. Up the Stairs If your elderly parents or grandmother have limited mobility, the handrails on the stairs will be of great benefit to them. Next to the Shower Safety bars make every shower safer when you have soapy hands and need to support yourself. Next to the Bathtubs If your child enjoys bathing in the tub, this handrail will give them a great deal of security. Next to the Toilet It is necessary to install a shower rail next to the toilet, especially for disabled people, elderly people, seniors and pregnant women. Easy Installation Tips: Fit the cover onto the grab rail. Tighten the three-hole base with the large screw. Mark the spot on the wall where you want to drill. Drill at the marked spot with the drill. First hammer the dowel into the drill hole. Insert the screws into the three-hole base, then screw the screws into the wall anchor with a screwdriver. Finally, slide the cover onto the base. Attach the cover to the armrest. Now it is fully assembled and ready for use. Note: Please hammer the dowel into the drill hole before screwing in the screws, as the dowel can protect the screw from breaking easily.
